examples: After her own struggle with this, Ms. Li took a step back and used her experience to build Sanity & Self, a self-care app and platform for overworked women.
His behaviour was so strange that I began to doubt his sanity.
After a series of road accidents the police pleaded for sanity among drivers.
Refusing to raise the debt ceiling may be a useful tactic to help restore fiscal sanity.
Experts say saving money while saving your sanity increases the chances for a better travel experience.
